presentation: conversational popup (.aic family) — multi-step, linear, progress bar
flow: LINEAR — everyone sees all questions; progress bar 0→100%. No branching.

merge_fields.{Q7}: what is most important to you today

personas.name: Senior Homeowner (55+)
personas.tagline: Protecting What You've Built, Planning What's Next

personas.name: Passive Investor
personas.tagline: Letting Your Money Do the Work

personas.name: Legacy Angel
personas.tagline: Designing Wealth That Lasts Beyond You

primary_profile_logic.rule: Primary = direct map from Q1 answer.

map.Just exploring: DERIVE — use highest secondary score as primary when 'just exploring' is picked

secondary_profile_logic.rule: Each answer option carries persona tags (weights). Tally across all answered questions. Secondary = highest-scoring persona that is NOT the Primary. 'Just exploring' primary => primary becomes the top score, secondary the next.
secondary_profile_logic.note: Scoring tags are editorial (built sensibly, not recovered from Outgrow). Listed per-question in scoring_tags.

guided_score_logic.section: Q24-Q35 — 0-3 ratings of how guided each professional made them feel.
guided_score_logic.use: Any professional scored 0 or 1 => surfaced in result as a recommended introduction ('room to grow') with a link to /get-a-local-introduction/. Also: compute a 'guidance_gap_count' and pass all 12 scores + the gap list to GHL.

result_screen.intro_line: You're in the driver's seat {fullname}! Now it's time to take your next step toward {Q7}.
result_screen.sub: Below you'll find your Primary Profile—the stage that best reflects your current goals. You'll also see a Secondary Profile you may want to begin exploring.
result_screen.shows: Primary persona card + Secondary persona card (image, name, tagline, personalized body, verse, 'Get the ___ Guide' CTA).
result_screen.gaps_block: If any guided-score gaps: a 'Strengthen your team' block listing recommended professional introductions -> /get-a-local-introduction/

final_cta.line: Ready to talk {fullname}? Let's map your next step together so you can {Q2}.
final_cta.sub: Schedule a call with a Stairway Advisor so you can turn goals into a plan.

ghl_fields.strategy: Option B default: send all answers with sensible snake_case keys + a full Q&A summary in 'quiz_summary' so nothing is lost even if custom-field keys don't match. Upgrade to exact key mapping when Jim provides field keys. Also send: primary_profile, secondary_profile, guidance_gap_count, guidance_gaps (list).

compliance.division_line: Stairway Mortgage is a division of NEXA Mortgage LLC.

open_flags: Secondary-profile scoring tags are editorial — confirm in spec summary before build.
Typos in original options (dispositoning, wihtout, montly, stratgic) — DECISION: fix silently in rebuild (clean copy).
'Just exploring' primary derives from top score.
Joke option 'A slice of pizza...' in Q7 — keep (brand personality) but it carries no persona weight.
